text: Kebun Bunga begonia paling pas buat foto2 Krn byk tempat yg bagus buat di upload di Instagram. Warna bunganya juga cerah2. HTM nya 20rb. Kalau kesini dari Lembang cari angkot yg arah Maribaya
english_translation: The Begonia Flower Garden is perfect for taking photos because there are many good spots to upload on Instagram. The flower colors are also bright. The entrance fee is 20,000. If you're coming here from Lembang, look for a public minivan (angkot) going towards Maribaya.

text: Udaranya segar, ada tempat outbond dan flying fox, tempat camping dan toilet yang bersih, namun jika ingin menikmati air terjun jangan datang pada saat musim kemarau karena debit airnya kecil
english_translation: The air is fresh, there are outbound and flying fox facilities, a campsite, and clean toilets, however, if you want to enjoy the waterfall, don't come during the dry season because the water flow is small.

text: Parkirnya luas, tempatnya bersih, toiletnya juga bersih. Lebih enak lagi kalau datang ketika baru buka karena bisa berfoto-foto di berbagai tempat tanpa harus antri atau terganggu orang lain.
english_translation: The parking is spacious, the place is clean, and the toilets are also clean. It's even better if you come when it just opens because you can take photos in various places without having to queue or be disturbed by other people.

text: Bersepeda dari bandung melalui jalan nasional, harus hati-hati karena banyak kendaraan besar, perjalanan yang melelahkan pada akhirnya sampai di Sanghyang Kenit tempat wisata alami yang sejuk
english_translation: Cycling from Bandung via the national road, you must be careful because there are many large vehicles. It was an exhausting journey but eventually arrived at Sanghyang Kenit, a cool natural tourist destination.

text: Tempatnya sejuk dan anginnya juga kenceng jadi enak buat nyegerin otak kalo lagi stres, parkiran luas dan banyak juga tukang jajan dan tukang makanan, untuk harga standar untuk tempat wisata.
english_translation: The place is cool and the wind is strong, so it's good for refreshing your mind when stressed. The parking lot is spacious and there are also many snack and food vendors. The prices are standard for a tourist spot.
aspects: place, air, parking, crowd, price, spot
sentiment: positive, positive, positive, positive, neutral, neutral
real_aspect: place, wind, parking, vendors, prices, spot

text: Tempat nya gak begitu cape nanjak. Cocok bagi yang pemula. Di tambah susana malah mari yang bagus bisa melihat kota bandung. Jangan lupa menggunakan jaket tebal ketika akan berkunjung kesini.
english_translation: The place isn't too strenuous to climb. It's suitable for beginners. Plus, the nice atmosphere here allows you to see Bandung city. Don't forget to wear a thick jacket when you visit here.

text: tempat wisata yang ada di bandung, nyaman, masih alami, pemandangan bagus kalau tidak ada kabut, juga menerapkan protok kesehatan, biaya masuk juga masih terjangkau, tempat berfoto juga bagus
english_translation: tourist attractions in Bandung, comfortable, still natural, good views if there is no fog, also implements health protocols, entrance fees are still affordable, photo spots are also good
aspects: attraction, accommodation, nature, view, weather, safety, ticket, photo, spot
sentiment: positive, positive, positive, neutral, negative, positive, positive, positive, positive
real_aspect: attractions, comfortable, natural, views, fog, protocols, fees, photo, spots

text: Air terjun pelangi ini merupakan air terjun terindah di bandung. Bagus banget dan masih asri. Kalo beruntung bakalan ketemu kawanan monyet. Tapi peer bgt sih turun tangga apalagi pas naiknya.
english_translation: This rainbow waterfall is the most beautiful waterfall in Bandung. It's really nice and still pristine. If you're lucky, you'll encounter a troop of monkeys. But descending the stairs is quite a challenge, especially on the way back up.
aspects: beauty, nature, attraction, crowd, accessibility, transportation
sentiment: positive, positive, positive, positive, neutral, negative
real_aspect: rainbow, waterfall, monkeys, waterfall, troop, stairs

text: Sunset is great, tapi harus bayar lebih lagi kalau mau disana lebih dari jam 18.00 karena penjaganya kurang ramah, akses jalan kesana juga sudah lumayan baik. Rekomended buat sunset pokoknya.
english_translation: The sunset is great, but you have to pay more if you want to stay there after 6:00 PM because the staff are not very friendly. The access road to get there is already quite good. Definitely recommended for the sunset.

text: Track kepuncaknya lumayan, apalagi sambil gendong sepeda hehe. Tp pas nyampe atas, Subhanalloh bagus banget pemandanganya....banyak spot2 keren buat selfie/wefie, htm 8rb/org, sepeda free....
english_translation: The track to the peak was quite good, especially carrying the bike hehe. But when we reached the top, Subhanallah, the view was very beautiful....lots of cool spots for selfies/wefies, entrance fee is 8 thousand rupiah/person, bike is free....

text:
Yg gak berubah :
+ Tetap nyaman untuk cari suasana alam. Udara sejuk. Tracking di kebun teh.
- jalan masuk sampai parkiran yg msh rusak.

english_translation:
What hasn't changed:
+ Still comfortable for finding nature. Cool air. Tracking in the tea garden.
- The road leading to the parking lot is still damaged.
What has changed:
- Rides are not operating. Flying fox, etc.
aspects: comfort, nature, air, trail, road, parking, activity
sentiment: positive, positive, positive, positive, negative, negative, negative

text: Pemandangan nya luar biasa...udara nya rejuk dan segar bangeeet...bisa detok paru2 jg...tiket masuk nya murah...pokok nya top banget tuk nenangin pikiran..cuma tempat nya aja yg lumayan jauuh
english_translation: The view is amazing... the air is really cool and fresh... it can also detox your lungs... the entrance ticket is cheap... basically, it's great for calming your mind.. it's just that the place is quite far away.

text: Tempatnya sangat luas, cocok untuk rekreasi dan belajar tentang ilmu geologi. Tempat parkir luas dan ada uang masuk, lupa berapa tapi ga terlalu mahal. Banyak spot2 foto bagus dan tempat makan
english_translation: The place is very spacious, suitable for recreation and learning about geology. The parking lot is spacious and there is an entrance fee, I forgot how much but it's not too expensive. Lots of good photo spots and places to eat.
aspects: place, spaciousness, parking, entrance, photo, place
sentiment: positive, positive, positive, neutral, neutral, positive
real_aspect: place, spacious, parking, entrance, fee, photo

text: Tempatnya kurang terawat ya.mungkin perlu diperbaiki lagi kaya tempat istirahatnya,buat yang jalan menuju curug karena lumyan jauh.medannya cocok buat yang suka bertualang cari oksigen bersih.
english_translation: The place is not well maintained. Perhaps it needs to be improved again, like the resting area and the path leading to the waterfall because it's quite far. The terrain is suitable for those who enjoy adventure and seeking fresh oxygen.

text:
Mantap pisan, dr segi pelayanan jg puas bgt
Harga tiket masuk lumayan murah cuma makananya yg menurut saya over price, contohnya teh poci yg biasa 5k jd 10k tp its oke karena ini tempat wisata
english_translation: Awesome, very satisfied with the service too. The entrance ticket price is quite cheap, it's just the food that I think is overpriced, for example, a regular Poci tea that's usually 5k is 10k, but it's okay because this is a tourist spot.

text:
Enak Sejuk asri cuma yg punya penyakit asma atau Kaki lebih baik jangan kesini soalnya harus naik turun banyak tangga..
Tolong buat pengunjung kebersihan di jaga buanglah sampah pada tempatnya
english_translation:
Pleasant, cool, and beautiful, but those with asthma or leg problems should probably not come here because there are many stairs to go up and down.
Please visitors, maintain cleanliness and throw trash in its place.

text: Tempat yg bagus, ada toilet dan kantin di area bawah. Suka ada gerombolan monyet, tapi baik2 kok monyetnya🙈. Sayang di beberapa spot banyak sampah pengunjung yg dibuang tidak pada tempatnya. …
english_translation: A good place, there are toilets and a canteen on the lower level. I like that there are groups of monkeys, but the monkeys are nice 🙈. It's a shame that in some spots there is a lot of visitor trash that is not disposed of properly. ...

text:
Destinasi wisata yg punya potensi untuk berkembang dan jadi idola.
Taman2 yg tersedia sudah cukup memanjakan mata.
Satu hal yg sangat saya suka adalah arca2 satria amartha...  keren luar biasa
english_translation:
A tourist destination with the potential to grow and become a favorite.
The gardens available are already quite pleasing to the eye.
One thing I really like is the Satria Amartha statues... incredibly cool.

text:
Kesana Hari jumat sore pas lagi hujan, jadinya berkabut + dingin bgt... Wood bridgenya bagus, jam 4 udah nyala lampunya.

Sepi karna emang jumat + hujan juga, bagus dapet view hutan pas hujan.
english_translation:
Went there Friday afternoon when it was raining, so it was foggy + very cold... The wooden bridge was nice, the lights were on at 4 o'clock.

It was quiet because it was Friday + raining, it was nice to get a forest view in the rain.

text: taman yang tidak terlalu luas namun indah...terletak dekat dengan sespim Polri yaitu jalan maribaya no 120 ..tiket masuk sebesar 15.000 . bagi yang akan memakai topi disediakan secara gratis..
english_translation: A garden that is not too spacious but beautiful... located close to Sespim Polri, on Jalan Maribaya no 120. The entrance fee is 15,000. For those who will be wearing hats, they are provided for free.

text:
Pada tahun 2018 harga tiket mulai dari 17.500/orang
Dan kayu bakar 15.000 /iket
Dari ketinggian bisa melihat kota bandung
Disaat malam maupun siaang
Yg punya motor trail bawa ajh bisa lewat ko
english_translation:
In 2018, ticket prices started from 17,500/person
And firewood 15,000/bundle
From the height, you can see Bandung city
Day or night
If you have a dirt bike, bring it along, you can pass through

text: Luar biasa asri masih terjaga dan belum terjamah banyak manusia. Masuk pun murah. Tapi jalanan menuju kesana nya yang muantap wkwkw pokonya best sih gak ngecewain untuk yang suka petualangan 💚
english_translation: Extraordinarily beautiful, still preserved and untouched by many humans. Entrance is also cheap. But the road to get there is amazing lol, it's definitely the best and not disappointing for those who like adventure 💚

text: SANGAT SANGAT PUAS, PEMANDANGANNYA BAGUS2, MAKANANNYA ENAK(cuma agak mahal hehe). Toiletnya bersih. Harga Tiket 50RB/ORANG. Baru buka 3 bulan jadi masih bersih dan bangunannya masih pada bagus
english_translation: VERY VERY SATISFIED, THE VIEWS ARE BEAUTIFUL, THE FOOD IS DELICIOUS (just a bit expensive hehe). The toilets are clean. Ticket price 50RB/PERSON. It just opened 3 months ago so it's still clean and the buildings are still in good condition.
aspects: view, food, price, restroom, ticket, opening_hours, maintenance, facility
sentiment: positive, positive, negative, positive, neutral, neutral, positive, positive
real_aspect: views, food, expensive, toilets, Ticket, opened, condition, buildings

text: Tempat yang cocok bagi para hiker dan camper. Tidak terlalu tinggi, sehingga  mereka yang tidak terlalu suka hiking tetap dapat menikmati pemandangan yang indah. Recommended for sunrise watch.
english_translation: A suitable place for hikers and campers. Not too high, so those who don't enjoy hiking too much can still enjoy the beautiful scenery. Recommended for sunrise watching.

text: Worth it banget healing ke sini... nyampe jam 4 pagi dan cuaca lagi dingin dinginnya karena lagi hujan 😌.  Seneng bgt. Buat ngecamp juga asyik bgt cuma kalo yang gakuat dingin ga disaranin 😬 …
english_translation: Totally worth it to heal here... arrived at 4 AM and the weather was freezing cold because it was raining 😌. So happy. It's also really fun for camping, just not recommended for those who can't handle the cold 😬 …

text: Sudah rapih dan lebih bagus dari sebelumnya,  namun pengelolaan sampah dan parkir harus lebih diperhatikan.  Akses jalan cukup sempit,  jadi harus hati2 krn banyak rombongan memakai Bus besar.
english_translation: It's tidy and better than before, but waste management and parking need more attention. The road access is quite narrow, so you have to be careful because many groups use large buses.
real_aspect: tidy, waste management, parking, road, groups

text: Curug layung tempat ya bersih sejuk banyak hutan pinus Ada camping ground fasilitas ada toilet bersih banyak warung di sekitar loket masuk juga di curug, kekurangannya Jalan menuju loket rusak
english_translation: Curug Layung is a clean, cool place with many pine forests. There is a campsite with clean toilet facilities and many warungs (small stalls) around. The entrance ticket is also at the waterfall. The downside is that the road leading to the entrance is damaged.

text: Saat datang kemarin kondisi lagi lumayan dingin, agak berkabut, pemandangan alam yang indah, sepanjang jalan banyak jualan baju2, tas2 rajut dengan harga yang termasuk ramah untuk tempat wisata
english_translation: When I arrived yesterday, the condition was quite cold, a bit foggy, the natural scenery was beautiful, and along the way, there were many shops selling clothes and knitted bags at prices that were quite friendly for a tourist spot.

text: Mantab tempatnya bersih.tiket masuk 30000 kalo mau paket plus kota mini , harga tiket jadi 40000... Setiap wahana didalam rata2 20-25 ribu... Khusus untuk rainbow slide 40000 dewasa anak2 15000
english_translation: Great place, it's clean. Entrance ticket is 30,000. If you want the city mini plus package, the ticket price becomes 40,000... Each ride inside costs around 20,000-25,000... Specifically for the rainbow slide, it's 40,000 for adults and 15,000 for children.

text:
nyaman dan ramai jika berkunjung saat weekend, tapi tempatnya sangat pas jika datang lg turun kabut tuh, adeem
overall ane enjoy sih, tapi ga tau pas lg terik ya hehe..
sekian dan terima kasih.
english_translation:
Comfortable and crowded if you visit on the weekend, but the place is perfect if you come when it's foggy, it's cool.
Overall I enjoyed it, but I don't know about when it's hot, hehe..
That's all, thank you.

text: Tempat nya nyaman banget bagus... Tidak bingung... Fasilitasnya juga bagus... Siap siap kedinginan kalau malam... Masih ada lingkungan hutan nya.. Penerangan kurang tp masih terlihat jalan nya.
english_translation: The place is very comfortable and nice... Not confusing... The facilities are also good... Be prepared to be cold at night... There's still a forest environment.. Lighting is insufficient but the path is still visible.
aspects: place, comfort, facility, weather, nature, light, path
sentiment: positive, positive, positive, negative, positive, negative, positive
real_aspect: place, comfortable, facilities, cold, forest, Lighting, path

text: Tempat wisata dalam kota Lembang bagus bersih nyaman ada pool jg tempat kuliner banyak makanan tradisonal sunda ada date kelinci pula wahana air jg ada buat anak2 pokoknya ok la buat keluarga..
english_translation: The tourist spot in Lembang city is good, clean, comfortable, and has a pool. There are many culinary spots with traditional Sundanese food, and a rabbit petting zoo. There are also water attractions for children. Overall, it's great for families.
aspects: spot, cleanliness, comfort, facility, food, attraction, facility
sentiment: positive, positive, positive, positive, positive, positive, positive
real_aspect: spot, clean, comfortable, pool, food, water, zoo

text: Salah satu destinasi kuliner dengan nuansa danau .pedagang floating diatas air ..kalo pembelinya sih tetap di darat hehe ..any way lumayan lah menjadi satu tempat yang menyajikan wahana berbeda
english_translation: One of the culinary destinations with a lake nuance. Traders float on the water.. but the buyers stay on land, hehe.. Anyway, it's quite good as a place that offers a different attraction.

text:
Tempat yang cukup nyaman untuk melepas penat.
Biasa saja. Cenderung kotor. Disarankan untuk masuk lewat CIC.
Pastikan kendaraan dalam kondisi prima untuk menuju lokasi ini. Tanjakannya lumayan.
english_translation:
A sufficiently comfortable place to relax.
Average. Tends to be dirty. Recommended to enter via CIC.
Ensure your vehicle is in excellent condition to reach this location. The incline is quite steep.

text: Tempat nya keren abis, walaupun lumayan jauh dari tempat parkir tapi udah sampe cape langsung ilang,cuma hati" kalo ujan jalan nya jadi licin banget sama suka ada air deres dari atas ke bawah..
english_translation: The place is super cool, even though it's quite a walk from the parking lot, the tiredness disappears as soon as you arrive. Just be careful when it rains because the path gets very slippery and there's often a strong flow of water from top to bottom.

text: Tempat yang bagus dikunjungi saat pagi sampai sore karena views nya dapet, kalo dah malem views nya kurang. Bagian yang menantang di jembatan merah. Dan jalan keliling dunia hanya sehari. Gokil
english_translation: A great place to visit from morning to afternoon because you get good views, but the views are less at night. The challenging part is the red bridge. And traveling around the world in just a day. Crazy!

text: Salah satu destinasi wisata, lebih baik bawa kendaraan sendiri karena dari pos tiket tidak ada kendaraan ada kendaraan ontang anting mahal tiket masuk perguruan orang 30rb mobil 35rb parkir 5eb
english_translation: One of the tourist destinations, it's better to bring your own vehicle because from the ticket post there are no vehicles, there are expensive shuttle vehicles, the entrance ticket for people is 30,000, cars are 35,000, parking is 5,000.
aspects: place, transportation, price, ticket, entrance, parking
sentiment: positive, negative, negative, neutral, neutral, neutral
real_aspect: destinations, vehicles, shuttle, ticket, entrance, parking

text:
ternyata bagusss, padahal rumah di subang. dan setelah lebih dri 20 tahun baru kesini ngoahahahah.

tips, beli jasuke enak bgt pas di makan saat cuaca dingin, karna waktu itu berkabut dan hujan
english_translation:
It turned out to be great, even though home is in Subang. And after more than 20 years, I'm finally here, ngoahahahah.

Tip: Buy jasuke (corn cheese snack). It's really delicious when eaten in cold weather, because at that time it was foggy and raining.

text:
Tempatnya seru, ada jembatan gantung, kastil, dan tempat iconic lainnya
Banyak spot foto yang oke..

Sayang tiket terusannya lumayan mahal.. Kalo yang bareng keluarga besar agak menguras dompet
english_translation:
The place is fun, there's a suspension bridge, a castle, and other iconic spots.
Lots of great photo spots.

It's a shame the entrance fee is quite expensive. If you're coming with a big family, it can be a drain on the wallet.
aspects: place, attraction, attraction, photo, entrance, price

real_aspect: place, bridge, castle, spots, entrance, fee

text: tempat wisata yg rekomendit deh, buat yang punya waktu sabtu dan minggu libur cukup ko liburan disini, resto nya makannya enak enak, permainannya untuk menguji adrenalin sangat sangat menantang
english_translation: A recommended tourist spot, if you have Saturday and Sunday off, it's enough for a vacation here. The restaurant's food is delicious, and the games for testing adrenaline are very, very challenging.

text: pertama kali kesini bareng stranger, mantap tempatnya buat ngobrol santai, kalo agak gerah bisa langsung ngojai, wkwk untuk harga sih worth it lah, waktu itu masuk 23.000 (udah include parkir).
english_translation: First time here with a stranger, the place is great for a relaxed chat, if it's a bit hot you can immediately swim, lol for the price, it's worth it, back then it was 23,000 (including parking).

text: Tempat main dikala waktu kecil, hiking dan setelahnya botram bareng keluarga. Tolong dijaga alamnya buat para pengunjung, terutama jangan buang sampah sembarangan, bawa turun kembali sampahnya.
english_translation: A place to play when I was little, hiking and after that a picnic with family. Please take care of nature for visitors, especially don't litter, take your trash back down with you.

text: Tempatnya bersih, kamar mandi juga ada, ada tempat jual makan juga. Waktu kmarin aaku kesana perorang bayar 25 rb dapet free minum 1. Pas ajak liburan keluarga kesini. Ada sewa sepeda air juga.
english_translation: The place is clean, there's also a bathroom, and a place to buy food. Last time I went, it was Rp 25k per person and included one free drink. It's a good place for a family holiday. There's also paddle boat rental.
aspects: place, restroom, food, price, drink, place, activity
sentiment: positive, positive, positive, neutral, positive, positive, positive
real_aspect: place, bathroom, food, Rp 25k, drink, place, paddle boat

text: Bumi perkemahan yang emang bener bener gak nyesel bayar 22.000 juga karena ada nya kamar mandi , mushola , lampu penerangan dan tentu nya view kaya di puncak gunung tapi gak harus naik gunung .
english_translation: A campsite that I genuinely have no regrets paying 22,000 for, because it has a bathroom, a prayer room, lighting, and of course, a view like from a mountaintop, but without having to climb a mountain.
real_aspect: campsite, bathroom, prayer room, lighting, view

text: Tempat menginap yang paling pas untuk yang mau tidur dengan  nuansa hutan. Kamar tipe studio. Suhu malam sampai 16 derajat. Sarapan sekelas hotel berbintang dan enak. Petugas ramah. Keamanan OK
english_translation: The most suitable place to stay for those who want to sleep amidst a forest ambiance. Studio-type rooms. Nighttime temperatures reach 16 degrees. Breakfast is like a star-rated hotel and delicious. Staff are friendly. Security is OK.
aspects: place, accommodation, atmosphere, weather, food, staff, security
sentiment: positive, positive, positive, neutral, positive, positive, neutral
real_aspect: place, rooms, ambiance, temperatures, Breakfast, Staff, Security

text: Tempat wisata alam cocok buat keluarga dan para petualang.  Suasana hijau sejuk dan segar dgn panorama yg indah.  Fasilitas minim, bnyk sampah yg  jorok dan jalur treking bnyk terhalang pipa air
english_translation: An ideal tourist spot for families and adventurers. A cool, fresh green atmosphere with beautiful panoramas. Minimal facilities, lots of dirty trash, and the trekking paths are heavily obstructed by water pipes.

text:

The place is spacious and also beautiful..
Many interesting spots there, suitable for family tours...

text: HTM 30 RB nanti dapat ditukerkan dengan Kopi/Milo Panas, Pasar Apung dan dapat belanja makanan jadi dengan Sistim Koin, Harga masih terjangkau, Dapat juga menikmati Wahana air seperti Perahu dll
english_translation: HTM 30 RB can be exchanged for Hot Coffee/Milo, the Floating Market, and you can buy ready-to-eat food using the Coin System. Prices are still affordable. You can also enjoy water attractions like Boats, etc.

text:
Tempat yang sangat indah
Udara yang sejuk dan dingin

A very beautiful place

text: jangan kesini musim ujan nerbener airnya kotor hehe terus bawa pelampung deh kalo gabisa renang wkwk kalo sewa byrnya 15k, tiket masuk juga 15k dan jalannya licin kalo ujan, agak jauh gt soalnya
english_translation: Don't come here during the rainy season, the water is dirty hehe, and bring a life vest if you can't swim wkwk, renting one costs 15k, the entrance ticket is also 15k, and the path is slippery when it rains, it's a bit far too.

text: HTM 15K. Parkir 2k. terawat, bagus, ga jauh kok jalannya dari pintu masuk. jalan masuk dr CIC berbatu parah nanjak, diminta uang perbaikan jalan di tengah jalan, tp ada karcisnya jadi resmi (2k)
english_translation: HTM 15K. Parking 2k. Well-maintained, good, the road isn't far from the entrance. The access road from CIC is very rocky and uphill, they asked for road repair money halfway, but there's a ticket so it's official (2k)
aspects: ticket, parking, road, entrance, road, maintenance

text: Taman bunga  yang tidak begitu luas namun cukup menarik untuk dikunjungi, yg menarik ada pohon pisang berdaun talas nggak tahu merupakan hasil rakayasa atau memang ada jenis talas yg seperti itu
english_translation: A not-so-spacious but interesting enough flower garden to visit. What's interesting is the banana tree with taro-like leaves. I don't know if it's a result of genetic engineering or if there's actually a type of taro that looks like that.

text: Taman hiburan baru di Area Punclut. Ada beberapa restoran yang bisa Anda pilih. Setiap restoran memiliki konsep yang berbeda. Seperti Cakrawala, Dago Bakery, Lereng Anteng, Tafso dan Boda Barn.

text: Mudah di jangkau. Pendakian tidak begitu tinggi. Jalan sudah bisa dilalui mobil. Tapi belum di aspal. Sudah tersedia toilet umum. Ada saung. Dekat dg pacuan kuda. Mulai di tata bisa juga untuk camping

text: Wow,,, tempatnya bagus, dingin dan sejuk, ada monyet banyak di taman ini, kita bisa memberi makan secara langsung dan Curug di tempat ini sangat deras aliran arus airnya, selamat berkunjung kemari ya.

text: Gunung tangkuban perahu merupakan gunung berapi aktif di Bandung. Lokasinya di lembang. Gunung ini terakhir meletus Agustus 2019. Sekarang destinasi wisata sudah dibuka untuk umum pasca erupsi terakhir.

text: Suasana hutan pinus dengan daya tarik outbond (flying fox, turun tebing, jembatan tunggal, paint ball) ada jg spot camping & glamping. Harga yang terjangkau, obyek wisata keluarga adventurer di Lembang.

text: Tempat yang asri, sejuk. Cocok untuk camping ceria bersama keluarga. Untuk mencapai curug aseupannya memang agak sulit dan tidak disarankan untuk anak- anak, tapi sesuai dengan yang kita harapkan sangatlah keren.

text: Bagus tempatnya, banyak wahananya, explore tempatnya juga luas. Yg pasti capek sih tapi puas. Usahain kalo mau dapet foto bagus datengnya pas sore jam 3 ke atas, karna lampunya baru dinyalain jam 5an. Puas kesana

text: Sekarang udah di renovasi jadi makin bagus. tiket masuk juga over pricey 30k satu orang. tempat yang bagus buat foto instagram gitu, terus disini juga nyediain studio buat photoshoot style jepang gitu pake kimono

text: Selalu ada spot foto yg keren buatan alam.,alhamdulillah cuaca mendukung.,pokoknya salah satu destinasi wisata di lembang yg wajib dikunjungi.,oleh2nya juga terjangkau bnget harganya.,ada jual makanan juga.,♥♥♥♥♥

text:

text:
Tempat wisata alam alternatif di daerah Bandung Barat dengan pesona keindahan hutan pinus. Air terjunnya tidak begitu bagus. Banyak objek untuk membuat foto yang intagramable.

text:
Tempat wisata berjarak kurang lebih dua jam dari kota Bandung. Tempat mudah di jangkau karena sudah ada jalan beraspal tepat menuju bibir kawah Gunung.

Di tempat ini juga tersedia banyak souveir dan tanpat beristirahat yang memadai.

The tourist attraction is approximately two hours away from Bandung city. The place is easy to reach because there is already an asphalt road leading directly to the crater's edge.

At this place, there are also many souvenirs and adequate resting spots available.

text:

campsite, and one of the best choices for watching the sunrise in Bandung, the entrance ticket is only under 10,000/person,

text: Tempat hiburan yang bisa memberikan sensasi... Yang membuat kita tanpa sadar. Sudah menghabiskan berjam-jam waktu tanpa terasa.. Keren... Lembang memang tempat menghilangkan rasa... Stress.. dan kejenuhan dari rutinitas sehari-hari..

Entrance ticket is Rp. 30,000 / person (the ticket can be exchanged for a drink). Recommended for family tours because there are many photo and play spots.

text:
Kedua kalinya ke Sanghyang Heuleut.. Pertama tahun 2014 dan sekarang 2019.
Banyak perubahan terutama trek menuju lokasi akibat Banjir Bandang Tahun 2017.
Sudah banyak warung dan penyewaan pelampung...
Semoga tetap terjaga keasriannya
english_translation:
Second time to Sanghyang Heuleut.. The first was in 2014 and now in 2019.
Many changes, especially the path to the location due to the Flash Flood in 2017.
There are already many stalls and life jacket rentals...
Hopefully, its natural beauty will be preserved.

text:
Tempat yg fresh, segar, alami, jauh dari hiruk pikuk kota, yg ingin refreshing dari daily rutin kota ini pilihan yg tepat, nyaman n ga ramai jg walaupun parkiran cukup penuh.

Makanan"nya harga standar lah masih masuk akal n enak" jg
english_translation:
A fresh, refreshing, natural place, far from the hustle and bustle of the city. If you want to refresh from the city's daily routine, this is the right choice. It's comfortable and not crowded, even though the parking lot is quite full.

The food prices are standard, still reasonable and also delicious.

text: Seruuu bisa jajan aneka makanan khas Bandung, harus tukar uang dulu dengan koin. Oh iya penukaran koin kena pajak. Range harga makanan antara 10rb -30 rb. Meski agak mahal dibandinhkan diluar tapi makanannya enak-enak semua. Worth it.
english_translation: It's fun to snack on various Bandung specialties, you have to exchange money for coins first. Oh yes, coin exchange is taxed. The food price range is between 10k - 30k. Although a bit expensive compared to outside, all the food is delicious. Worth it.

text: Ini tempat cocok banget buat kalian yang mau camping tapi gamau terlalu cape buat naik ke puncaknya. Lahan campingnya cukup luas, tetapi suka membeludak pengunjung apalagi di weekend. Inget bro&sis buat jangan buang sampah sembarangan
english_translation: This place is perfect for those who want to camp but don't want to be too tired climbing to the summit. The campsite is quite spacious, but it gets crowded, especially on weekends. Remember, bros and sis, not to litter.

text: Tempatnya enak, nyaman dan asri. Banyak sekali spot foto di sini. Tidak hanya dipajang, beberapa bunga bahkan dijual di sini dengan harga bervariasi. Selain kebun bunga ada juga kebun buah, ruang pertemuan, restoran dan toko souvenir.

text:

text:

english_translation:
The atmosphere is cool and perfect for a casual camping trip because it's really nice and aesthetic. You can also rent bikes (another 25,000 for 1 hour). It's super suitable for dating or bringing the family!

P.S.: Don't buy es podeng there because there are many flies and it's expensive.

text: Kesini karena anak2 penasaran dengan permainan rainbow slidenya, yg lainnya biasa saja, untuk kuliner terapungnya harga rata2 25 rb sistemnya tukar koin , klu tukar koin ga bisa di refund kembali uangnya serta dikenakan 10 persen pajak

text:

Sebenarnya ingin memberikan 5 bintang ⭐ untuk tempat foto, semuanya benar-benar luar biasa 👍🏻

Tetapi! Makanannya mengerikan 😂 jamur goreng dan sate bakso rasanya buruk.

Gelato terlalu manis, yang seharusnya tidak terasa seperti itu.
english_translation:
Actually wanted to give 5 stars ⭐ for the photo spot, everything was really amazing 👍🏻

But! The food was terrible 😂 the fried mushrooms and meatball satay tasted bad.

The gelato was too sweet, which it shouldn't taste like.

text: Tempatnya membingungkan antara rumah makan tempat wisata dan area parkir. Pokoknya patokan ada alfamart dan indomart, ada gedung tinggi seperti hotel . Reservasi dulu disitu, agak awkward awal karena bawa motor jas uja. Dan malam hari.
english_translation: The place is confusing, a mix of a restaurant, tourist spot, and parking area. Basically, the landmarks are an Alfamart and an Indomart, and a tall building like a hotel. You have to reserve first. It was a bit awkward at first because I arrived on a motorcycle in the rain and at night.
aspects: place, spot, restaurant, parking, hotel, opening_hours
sentiment: negative, positive, neutral, neutral, neutral, negative
real_aspect: place, spot, restaurant, parking, hotel, reserve

text:
Disekitar curug ada untuk area outdoor activity banyak. Ada painball, flying fox, area camp.
Kalau mau adakan gathering bagus juga.
Pemandangan alam dan suara air dari curug yg menaglir memberikan nuansa relax yang baik buat refrsehing
english_translation:
Around the waterfall, there are many areas for outdoor activities. There's paintball, flying fox, and a camping area.
It's also good for hosting gatherings.
The natural scenery and the sound of the flowing waterfall provide a good relaxing atmosphere for refreshment.

text: Tempat wisata instragamable,selpi-selpi,udara sejuk pemandangan nya okeh,akses menuju nya yg lumayan lama, jalan rada sempit, kebenaran hari libur jadi parkir penuh, dan rada jauh dari pintu masuk jadi jalan kaki,,,, okeh siip dah 😌🤗 …
english_translation: Instagrammable tourist spot, lots of selfies, cool air, the view is okay, access is quite long, the road is a bit narrow, it happened to be a holiday so parking was full, and a bit far from the entrance so had to walk,,,, okay, it's great 😌🤗
aspects: spot, air, view, accessibility, road, parking, entrance, walking
sentiment: positive, positive, neutral, negative, negative, negative, negative, negative
real_aspect: spot, air, view, access, road, parking, entrance, walk

text:
Curug pelangi yg bener-bener ada pelanginya. Cantik banget 🥺🥺 tiketnya 20k parkir 5k
Dibawah ada toilet, mushola dan warung
Turun tangga gak kerasa. Perjalanan pulang alias naik tangganya itu mantab banget. Bikin kaki Tremor parah wkwkw
english_translation:
A rainbow waterfall that *actually* has a rainbow. So beautiful 🥺🥺 Ticket is 20k, parking is 5k
Below there are toilets, a prayer room, and a small shop.
Going down the stairs doesn't feel like anything. The trip back, meaning climbing the stairs, is amazing. Makes your legs shake badly lol
aspects: attraction, ticket, parking, restroom, facility, facility, walking, walking
sentiment: positive, neutral, neutral, neutral, neutral, neutral, negative, positive
real_aspect: waterfall, Ticket, parking, toilets, room, shop, stairs, stairs

text: Jarak dari pintu masuk ke curug tilu lumayan menguras tenaga, tetapi seru. Sangat cocok untuk orang yang mempunyai jiwa petualang karena perjalanan masuk ke hutan dan menyusuri aliran air. Di curugnya pun terdapat warung kopi, mie, dll.
english_translation: The distance from the entrance to Curug Tilu is quite tiring, but exciting. It's very suitable for adventurous people because of the journey into the forest and along the stream. At the waterfall, there's also a coffee shop, instant noodles, etc.

text: Pemandangan yang sangat menakjubkan dan pengunjung nya pun ramai meski beberapa kali diselimuti kabut dan diguyur hujan tidak mengurangi rasa penasaran para pengunjung semoga pemandangan alam tangkuban perahu selalu terjaga kealamiannya
english_translation: A very amazing view and the visitors were crowded even though it was covered by fog several times and showered with rain, it did not reduce the visitors' curiosity. Hopefully, the natural beauty of Tangkuban Perahu will always be preserved in its naturalness.

text: One of the best Curug nearby Bandung. Treknya cukup menantang, karena pulangnya baru nanjak. Ke sana pas musim panas, jd warnanya hijau, bersih, sedikit orang mungkin karena lokasinya lebih sulit u dijangkau dibanding Sanghyang Heuleud.
english_translation: One of the best waterfalls near Bandung. The trek is quite challenging because the return trip is uphill. Went there during the dry season, so it was green, clean, and had few people, possibly because the location is harder to reach compared to Sanghyang Heuleud.

text: cukup baik, lingkungan alam masi asri, cocok untuk tempat menghilangkan kejenuhan, utk kebersihan perlu ditingkatkan lagi karena banyaknya sampah yang ada di dalam tempat wisata mudah dijumpai. overall cukup baik, next time kembali lagi
english_translation: Quite good, the natural environment is still beautiful, suitable for a place to relieve boredom. For cleanliness, it needs to be improved again because a lot of trash is easily found within the tourist spot. Overall, it's quite good, will come back next time.

text: Wisata yang bernuansa alam, membuat pengalaman yang menakjubkan... Sangat cocok untuk berlibur bersama keluarga... Mungkin jika tempat penginapan nya ditambah WiFi dan telephone yang tersambung ke room service akan terasa lebih maxsimal
english_translation: Nature-themed tourism makes for an amazing experience... Very suitable for holidays with family... Perhaps if the accommodation added WiFi and a telephone connected to room service, it would feel even more maximized.

text: Tempat nya cocok buat refresh karena di alam. Sangat bagus.  Tapi utk camp nya kalo bisa di tingkatkan lagi pelayanannya.  Karna camp beberapa ada yg bocor dan sleping bag bau smua karna lembab.utk restonya kalo bisa menu nya di cocokan
english_translation: The place is suitable for refreshment because it's in nature. Very good. But for the camp, if the service can be improved. Because some of the tents were leaking and all the sleeping bags smelled musty due to dampness. For the restaurant, if the menu can be adjusted.
aspects: place, nature, service, facility, maintenance, accommodation, food
sentiment: positive, positive, negative, negative, negative, negative, neutral
real_aspect: place, nature, service, tents, dampness, camp, menu

text:
Tampat nya oke banget , akses jalan bagus , udah pake tangga juga . Jalan kaki beberapa menit udah nyampe di area camp . Cocok buat liburan keluarga .
Klo cuaca nya cerah bisa liat citylight dimalam hari and lautan awan di pagi hari nya
english_translation:
The location is really great, the road access is good, there are already stairs. You can reach the camp area by walking for a few minutes. It's suitable for a family holiday.
If the weather is clear, you can see the city lights at night and the sea of clouds in the morning.

text:
Tempatnya adem, banyak wahana, atau kalau cuma pengen lihat pemandangan saja juga enak.
Tiket akhir pekan 35k dan bisa ditukar welcome drink.
Sayangnya toilet dan mushola terbatas sekali, mungkin sudah waktunya pengelola membuat masjid.
english_translation:
The place is cool, there are many rides, or if you just want to enjoy the scenery, it's also nice.
Weekend tickets are 35k and can be exchanged for a welcome drink.
Unfortunately, the toilets and prayer rooms are very limited, maybe it's time for the management to build a mosque.
aspects: place, scenery, ticket, drink, restroom, management, facility
sentiment: positive, positive, neutral, neutral, negative, negative, negative
real_aspect: place, scenery, tickets, drink, toilets, management, prayer rooms

text: Sarae hills tergolong tempat wisata baru. Tapi untuk pelayanannya sangat baik. Hanya saja daerahnya cukup panas. Mungkin akan jadi tempat yang nggak musiman kalau disediakan aneka makanan khas negeri luar sesuai bangunan landmark disana
english_translation: The Sarae hills are considered a new tourist spot. But the service is very good. It's just that the area is quite hot. It might become a year-round destination if various international cuisines are provided according to the landmark buildings there.

text: Tempatnya bersih..rindang n asri..cocok untuk acara keluarga..gathering..reunian..ditambah dng pasar apungnya..buat foto-2 okay..👍👍.sayang saat itu toiletnya ada yg nutup...🙏untuk kedepannya smoga floating market makin yg terdepan...😘 …
english_translation: The place is clean.. shady and green.. suitable for family events.. gatherings.. reunions.. plus the floating market.. good for photos.. 👍👍. It's a shame that some of the toilets were closed at the time... 🙏 Hopefully in the future the floating market will become even more leading... 😘 …

text: Tempat okee cuman siap siap aja buat kalian yang dateng kesini jadi ank kecil,semua d atur oleh panitia,gaboleh kesana kesini,kita kan tujuan nya main bersenang senang lah ini  malah  di atur atur klooo perlu gwe bilang anjinggg babyyy,
english_translation: Okay place, but be prepared, kids, everything is managed by the committee. You can't go here and there. We came here to play and have fun, but instead we're being controlled. Honestly, I'd call you a "baby dog" if I could.

text: Akses ke lokasi mudah, lebih baik berkunjung saat weekdays dan sore hingga malam, banyak spot foto yang menggunakan lampu, lebih terlihat oke saat sore hari, namun ada beberapa tempat yang berbayar lagi selain tiket masuk.. so sad.. 😢 …
english_translation: Easy access to the location, better to visit on weekdays and in the afternoon until evening. Many photo spots use lights, looking better in the afternoon. However, there are some places that require additional payment besides the entrance ticket... so sad.. 😢 ...
aspects: accessibility, location, opening_hours, photo, light, entrance, ticket, atmosphere
sentiment: positive, positive, neutral, positive, positive, negative, negative, negative
real_aspect: access, location, afternoon, photo, lights, entrance, ticket, places

text:
Kesini d akhir pekan usai lebaran
Rame bgt
Bks-Bandung
Cm mau ke sarae hills
Thn lalu kesini blm ada
Tmpt'a bagus,klo sejuk mah gak usah d tnya yaa
Tp sedih pas plng helm'a hilang
Tmpt penitipan helm'a trlalu kecil

english_translation:
Came here at the end of the weekend after Eid.
So crowded.
Bekasi-Bandung

Last year when I came here, this wasn't here yet.
The place is nice, and of course, it's cool.
But sad, my helmet disappeared when I was leaving.
The helmet check counter was too small.
Ended up going back to Bekasi 😭

text: Pemandangan cukup bagus. Sayang tempat parkir kurang dan banyak kera di dalam area wisata yang agak mengganggu kenyamanan wisatawan. Bisa ditempuh dari Setiabudi-Lembang maupun Dago. Untuk rute dari Lembang sangat macet di mada liburan.
english_translation: The view is quite good. Unfortunately, the parking lot is insufficient and there are many monkeys within the tourist area which are quite disruptive to tourist comfort. It can be reached from Setiabudi-Lembang or Dago. The route from Lembang is very congested during holidays.

text: Waaaah berkesan krn penuh perjuangan ,entah bisa kesitu lagi atau ngga, mendapatkan medan seperti itu, semoga saja cepat mendapat perhatian dr pihak terkait buat memperingan akses menuju kesana, sayang tempatnya indah tp sulit dijangkau
english_translation: Waaaah, it was memorable because it was full of struggle. I don't know if I'll ever be able to go there again, to get such a terrain. Hopefully, it will quickly get attention from the relevant parties to ease access to get there. It's a shame the place is beautiful but difficult to reach.

text: Berkemah sehari semalam di tempat ini sungguh menyenangkan. Curug yang indah, udara yang dingin, suluh-suluh untuk dibakar yang mudah dipesan, toilet yang lumayan, jalur tracking yang menantang, sungai dengan air dingin yang mengesankan.
english_translation: Camping for a day and a night in this place was truly enjoyable. Beautiful waterfall, cold air, readily available firewood, decent toilets, challenging trekking trails, and a river with impressive cold water.
aspects: place, nature, air, facility, restroom, trail, river, water
sentiment: positive, positive, positive, positive, positive, positive, positive, positive
real_aspect: place, waterfall, air, firewood, toilets, trails, river, water

text: Tempatnya luas dan bersih. Untuk wahananya lumayan banyak dan spot foto banyak. Biayanya masuknya tidak terlalu mahal. Kawasannya luas dan trayek jalannya banyak turunan dan naikan, kayanya ga cocok untuk orang tua yang sulit jalan jauh.
english_translation: The place is spacious and clean. There are quite a lot of rides and many photo spots. The entrance fee is not too expensive. The area is large and the paths have many ups and downs, so it's probably not suitable for elderly people who have difficulty walking long distances.
aspects: place, spaciousness, cleanliness, attraction, photo, entrance, price, path, walking, accessibility
sentiment: positive, positive, positive, positive, positive, neutral, neutral, positive, negative, negative
real_aspect: place, spacious, clean, rides, photo, entrance, fee, area, paths, walking

text: Gak bersahabat buat yang solo traveller. Masuk harus ada pemandu dengan harga 80.000 utk 2 org pas weekend. Krn saya sendiri. Yah ogah bayar 80 ribu mah. Cus langsung ke curug cimahi yang lebih bersahabat dr segi harga itk solo traveller
english_translation: Unfriendly for solo travelers. Entry requires a guide with a price of 80,000 for 2 people on weekends. Since I was alone, I wasn't willing to pay 80,000. So, I directly went to Curug Cimahi which is more solo-traveler friendly in terms of price.
aspects: staff, safety, price, entrance, guide, price, attraction, place
sentiment: negative, negative, negative, negative, negative, negative, positive, positive
real_aspect: travelers, solo, price, entry, guide, price, Curug Cimahi, Curug Cimahi

text: Dari luar kota ngajakin anak2 liburan ke Bandung, dan nyempetin harus ke Floating Market. Worth it 🥰. Ternyata explore nya gak cukup 1 hari buat keliling2. Tambah lagi ke Kota Mini, anak2 excited banget, udah jam 5 sore menolak pulang😂 …
english_translation: Invited the kids for a vacation to Bandung from outside the city, and made sure to visit Floating Market. Worth it 🥰. Turns out exploring it takes more than 1 day to get around. Also went to Kota Mini, the kids were so excited, they refused to go home even at 5 PM 😂 …

text: Pemandangannya sangat luar biasa. Cukup jauh. Dan untuk menuju lokasi air terjun harus berjalan kaki atau naik ojek. Kalau jalan kaki cukup menguras tenaga. Kalau naik ojek cukup menguras adrenalin. Ongkos ojeg 25 - 30 ribu sekali jalan.
english_translation: The view is amazing. Quite far. And to get to the waterfall location, you have to walk or take a motorbike taxi. Walking is quite tiring. Taking a motorbike taxi is quite adrenaline-inducing. The motorbike taxi fare is 25-30 thousand one way.
aspects: view, location, taxi, walking, taxi, taxi, walking
sentiment: positive, negative, negative, negative, neutral, neutral, negative
real_aspect: view, location, taxi, walking, taxi, fare, tiring

text:
Tempat wisata kuliner yang penjualnya menjajakan dagangannya di atas perahu kecil.
Menarik, tempatnya bagus, banyak jajanan yang enak, asik buat liburan. Toiletnya juga cukup bersih.
Harga tiket Rp20.000,- bisa ditukarkan dengan minuman.
english_translation:
A culinary tourist spot where vendors sell their wares from small boats.
Interesting, the place is nice, there are many delicious snacks, great for a holiday. The toilets are also quite clean.
The ticket price is Rp20,000, which can be exchanged for a drink.
aspects: spot, place, food, price, drink, restroom, cleanliness
sentiment: positive, positive, positive, neutral, positive, positive, positive
real_aspect: spot, place, snacks, price, drink, toilets, clean

text: Mantap siihh.... Tempatnya bersih, nyaman, enakeun curug yang kalian ga harus jalan jauh jauh duluu, bisa buat ngecamo juga... sayang akses buat ke curugnya cuma ada tangga kecil banget dan harus bayar lagi... Tapi worth ut banget siihhh
english_translation: Awesome... The place is clean, comfortable, and the waterfall is great as you don't have to walk far. It's also suitable for camping... Unfortunately, the access to the waterfall is only a very small staircase and you have to pay again... But it's totally worth it.
aspects: place, comfort, nature, accessibility, accessibility, parking
sentiment: positive, positive, positive, negative, negative, neutral
real_aspect: place, comfortable, waterfall, access, staircase, parking

text: Tempatnya luas dan ada wahana baik wahana di air ataupun wahana di darat. Salah satu wahana yang rekomen ada rainbow slide. Harga makanan dan wahana masih cukup terjangkau namun untuk makanan harus pintar memilih agar tidak mengecewakan.
english_translation: The place is spacious and has attractions both in the water and on land. One recommended attraction is the rainbow slide. The prices for food and attractions are still quite affordable, but you have to choose carefully when it comes to food to avoid disappointment.
aspects: place, attraction, water, attraction, price, food, food
sentiment: positive, positive, positive, positive, positive, positive, positive
real_aspect: place, attractions, water, land, attraction, prices, food

text: Rekreasi keluarga wajib datang ke tempat ini, tiket saat weekend yang all in 75k/orang dan 60k/orang yang biasa. Ada music live nya juga saat weekend. Kalau kalian mau ke mesir, newyork, roma, itali dalam 1 tempat, sarae hills jawabannya
english_translation: A family recreation must-visit! Tickets on weekends are all-in for 75k/person and the regular is 60k/person. There's also live music on weekends. If you want to go to Egypt, New York, Rome, and Italy all in one place, Sarae Hills is the answer.

text:
Wisata alam. Cocok utk petualangan anak2 dan juga outbond kantor. Suasana yg sejuk bisa merefresh penatnya pekerjaan,
Sudah tersedia tenda-tenda yg di tata rapi dan rumah kayu yg sudah ada air hangatnya.
Tidak nyesel n layak utk di coba.
english_translation:
Nature tourism. Suitable for children's adventures and also for office outbound. The cool atmosphere can refresh the fatigue from work.
Tents are already neatly arranged and wooden houses with hot water are available.
You won't regret it and it's worth trying.

text: Tempatnya menarik buat dikunjungi, apalagi bareng pacar sambil menikmari sunrise. Hati-hati terhadap barang karena banyak monyet berkeliaran. Jalan masuk dan tempat parkir perlu dibenahi lagi sehingga jadi tempat wisata yang benar2 layak.
english_translation: The place is interesting to visit, especially with a boyfriend/girlfriend while enjoying the sunrise. Be careful with your belongings as there are many monkeys roaming around. The entrance and parking area need to be improved to make it a truly worthwhile tourist spot.
